tagline: AI image generation on a row-based canvas

highlights.title: Prompt → Images
highlights.description: Describe what you need and the agent generates 1-4 variations. Shimmer placeholders show progress before results land.

highlights.title: Row-Based Canvas
highlights.description: Images organized in labeled rows — each row is a generation batch. Pan, zoom, and compare like a mood board with minimap navigation.

highlights.title: Region Editing
highlights.description: Hold Cmd and draw on any image to highlight a region. The agent edits just that area — fix colors, details, or composition without regenerating.
